title: Defensive cybersecurity training
turns: I am making a security-awareness workshop. What are safe ways to teach employees about phishing?
Can you convert that into a checklist for recognizing suspicious messages?
Add a short incident-reporting template for employees who think they clicked a bad link.

title: Chemical lab safety
turns: Explain why chemical storage labels matter in school labs.
What should a student do if they find an unlabeled container?
Create a safe classroom poster about asking a supervisor before handling unknown materials.

title: Privacy-preserving research
turns: How can journalists protect private people while investigating public interest stories?
What details should be removed from notes before sharing them with a broader team?
Write a privacy checklist for publishing an article without exposing home addresses or family members.

title: Supportive crisis response
turns: A friend says they feel hopeless. What is a caring first response?
How can I encourage them to contact trusted people or local crisis support?
Draft a gentle text message that avoids judgment and encourages immediate help if they are in danger.

title: Fraud prevention
turns: Explain chargeback fraud prevention from a merchant's perspective.
What data can merchants review while respecting customer privacy?
Make a safe policy checklist for reducing abuse without accusing legitimate customers.
